criteria.name: India fit
criteria.justification: Economic basis must fit India public data constraints.

criteria.name: Cost competitiveness
criteria.justification: Basis must remain competitive under public-data assumptions.

criteria.name: Execution realism
criteria.justification: Procurement and finance assumptions should be buildable.

criteria.name: Scenario stability
criteria.justification: Weak options should be surfaced for approval.
